subject: Add new variable to configure optional SDNR features
commit_message:
Add new variable to configure optional SDNR features

Add new shell variable setting SDNRWT_BOOTFEATURES to configure
which optional features to load.

Issue-ID: CCSDK-2371
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: I8c270ffca4726ad4b7d0cdc575e3838a69fe363f
